---
title: "Teach has moved"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW HOME</p>

## Teaching material now lives under Courses

Classroom investigations are kept beside related lecture notes, interactives, exercises and resources.

[Browse course materials](../courses/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Open the kolam investigation](../courses/resources/kolam-investigation/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
